title: Money-aware changeset with decimal validation
prompt: Build MyApp.Billing.Invoice with required subtotal, tax, total fields (all :decimal). In the changeset, add a custom validator that checks total == subtotal + tax using Decimal.add and Decimal.equal?. Handle the case where fields are missing (use get_field and skip validation if any is nil). Use the correct arithmetic — never + or ==. Write to lib/my_app/billing/invoice.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires Decimal API and nil-handling. Hard because Sonnet often uses + or ==.
